message:
feat(layout,parser,render): add LayoutConfig with custom font metrics, expand Mermaid parser coverage, and refactor SVG text rendering

Layout system:
- Introduce LayoutConfig struct that bundles LayoutAlgorithm with
  optional custom FontMetrics, replacing the bare algorithm parameter
  in the layout entry point (renamed layout_diagram_traced_with_config_and_guardrails)
- fm-core font_metrics.rs: minor adjustment to default metrics API
- fm-layout: significant expansion of layout logic with improved node
  sizing, edge routing pressure calculations, and guardrail enforcement

Parser improvements:
- fm-parser mermaid_parser.rs: expand grammar coverage with ~85 new lines
  handling additional Mermaid diagram syntax variants
- fm-parser ir_builder.rs: enhanced IR construction for new node types

Rendering refactor:
- fm-render-svg lib.rs: major refactoring of SVG generation pipeline
  with improved text positioning, viewBox calculation, and theme integration
- fm-render-svg text.rs: remove ~100 lines of legacy text measurement
  code that is now handled by the centralized FontMetrics system
- fm-render-svg theme.rs: expanded theme configuration options

Canvas and WASM:
- fm-render-canvas: add new renderer methods for canvas-based output
- fm-wasm: update WASM bindings to accept LayoutConfig and expose
  new font metrics configuration to JavaScript callers

CLI:
- fm-cli: wire LayoutConfig through the render command pipeline with
  a FIXME noting that custom font metrics from CLI flags are not yet
  exposed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
